1.content: Alright, so let's start this story of massive boobs. Since we're staying in the real world for this story, let's start with where we would like our story set. So, what continent are we starting in?
1.title: Beginning a Tale

11.content:
Already, so we're going for the America's, huh? Well, do you have a specific part of the America's you'd like to do? And now, random history:

Canada: You know the famous Maple Leaf flag Canada has? It didn't always have that. In fact, it didn't have a flag at all until 1965, 100 years after it became a country

The US: The first President, George Washington, wasn't actually the first man to live in the White House. It was actually John Adams. While George did oversee it's construction, he didn't live in it.

Central America: You know Christopher Columbus, the explorer we all talk about as landing in America? His first steps were in Central America, specifically in what is today known as Honduras.

South America: While South America is it's own continent, two parts of it are still overseen by European countries: French Guiana, and the Falkland Islands.

American Island facts will appear in their option page.
11.title: The Americas

So, more characters living in the US, huh? Alright, who do we got?

Always a smart, kind girl, Sakura wanted nothing more then to see the world. So, as soon as she finished college at 24, she started searching for a job in the states. Due to her unusually large bust, finding a job has been problematic. But she eventually found an entry-level secretary job at an IT company, and managed to, in just 3 years, rise to floor manager position. She speaks both Japanese and English.

So, she powered through Law School, earned her diploma, and became the attorney she was meant to be. Having not always been happy with her figure, Tina had gotten rather large breast implants, and they certainly help her stand out. She's serious on the stand, but fun-loving otherwise.

choices: She's actually needed to use some of her Japanese skills.
She helping on a project involving Pixar.
As an entry-level secretary, she's in the general typing pool.
On the way to work, her car broke down.
11231.content:
Sakura looked out the window, facing another day in the office. As she yawned, she sat up. Feeling the weight she'd face the entire day, as her bust starting pulling at her shoulders. Massaging her shoulders, she readied them for the day ahead.

While her bust was of a size beyond what she'd ever wanted, she could still carry it with a sense of pride. Back home, well her parents home back in Japan she'd always stood out in the crowd. She was blessed with a petite stature, but somewhere genetics had betrayed her. Hitting puberty, she blossomed like her name. Feeling mature as she was the first of her class to develop. But, as she grew... she continued to grow.

Her parents encouraged her to embrace her development, as unique. But, the snide words from her former friends had her questioning the wisdom of that. She didn't like the attention it brought from the boys either. But, at least their lust was obvious. Whether it was envy, or whatever, she found it hard to keep female friends.

Even the teachers, who knew her grades seemed to treat her differently. As if she had some intellectual challenge. Meaning everyone and no-one was surprised when she went to university.

At points, she even quizzed her parents. Her friends suggesting being so... so busty meant she wasn't really Japanese. Somewhere in her family tree a Gaijin lurked. She felt like she stood out, enough without the self-doubt.

- - - - -

At Doisha College, she studied English the hardest option she could find. The language was so irregular that it infuriated her. But, she earned a first class degree, and spent in incredible year abroad. Choosing the UK, and ending up in Glasgow, Scotland, she perfected what was a very particular Scottish accent. The films were grim, but the country and the people intriguing. She'd watched all the Harry Potter films, 'Trainspotting' and 'Sweet Sixteen'.

However, once she graduated, it was America that called to her. The old country was beautiful, and she loved visiting various Harry Potter sites, but for work she wanted the land of opportunity.

- - - - -

Arriving in California was intimidating. Her finances were limited, so she took the first job she could find. Her parents were immensely proud of her achievement, and frustrated by her desire to go beyond Japan for work. However, her brief taste of Scotland had shown her a wider variety of roles, and choices than Japan would've allowed.

Even, Scotland! Sakura shook her head. It was there she discovered quite how much diet affected figure. Though she'd watched what she ate, and kept things modest. Her bust betrayed her, every extra inch going to her figure.

In Scotland the women were very curvy, but chunky too. The food was delicious, but incredibly unhealthy.

- - - - -

"くそ。" Sakura swore as she pulled on her bra. Fastening it in place, she felt the weight settle.

https://i.pinimg.com/originals/41/ea/d2/...

Her panties clung to a rump, that was decidely unjapanese too. "A fine juicy peach, an erse worth a skelp!..." she growled in a broad Scots accent. Just like the drunk in the park. Idly, she wondered which would sound more alien to her Californian bosses. Both were in contention for being incomprehensible.

Shaking her head, she tried not to think of the OL's back in Tokyo, who'd wear padding to create the curves their bosses could appreciate.

Hopping into her compact, she drove off to work. A secretary at an IT company, the job was frankly beneath her. However, she'd won it, and the contract paid the rent. Besides, the labour market, and her position was so uncertain it might vanish at any point.
11231.title: Sakura Suzuki

She is proud of her giant jiggling assets and is aware of the attention they give her. She plans on being a model one day but who knows what fate could have in store for her.

12.content:
Alright, we're heading for Europe. Now then, which part of Europe is this story taking place in? And now, history:

The UK: Beards were a status symbol in the UK in 1535, after King Henry VIII introduced a "beard tax". The higher you were in society, the more tax was collected off your beard.

Scotland: The modern version of golf we play came from Scotland. It is home to the Old Course of St. Andrews, widely considered the oldest golf course in the world.

Ireland: You know the White House? The architect who designed it was Irish. Yup, a man by the name of James Hoban is responsible for it, and some modifications made during his life time.

Germany: Uranus and Neptune were discovered by Germans: Uranus by German born British composer and astronomer William Herschel in 1781, and Neptune by astronomer Johann Galle in 1846.
12.title: Europe

123.content:
Ah, Ireland. A country I've often wanted to visit. A fine starting place for the story. So, who are we following?


Name: Ciera Flanigan

Age: 22

Place of Birth: Passage West, Cork, Ireland

Height: 5'8''

Weight: 143 Ibs.

Bust Size: 70 cm (2.2 Feet)

Born to a family of fishermen, Ciera knew the sea was where she belonged. A steadfast and easygoing girl, Ciera is just about the easiest person to talk to, and always ready with a tale of the sea. She doesn't really mind the fact that's she's bustier then normal, and sometimes it does get in the way of her fishing. She's part of a group of women with large busts, though she's the bustiest.


Name: Aoife Westman

Age: 31

Place of Birth: Drogheda, Ireland

Height: 6'

Weight: 214 Ibs.

Bust Size: 102 cm (3.3 Feet)

Growing up in a modest family, Aoife wanted to be a star. Once high school ended, she went straight for modeling school. And after 5 years, she graduated top of her class, and was the fashion model she felt she was meant to be. She stands out amongst other models, due to the fact that her family genes caused her to grow an immense pair of breasts. Despite their weight, she is proud of her unique figure. Generally, she's a haughty, arrogant model, but can be friendly.
123.title: Ireland

choices: Ciera continues the tour, ending at the tea shop...
His wife caught the exchange, and elbowed him in the ribs.
Sighing, Ciera tried to ignore the other stares, she felt boring into her bust!
She started talking about the historic jewellery she was wearing...
1231.content:
Ciera was proud at being the first in her family to get into University. Studying Art and History, she worked as a guide, at the local lord's house. Well, it was a mansion really, with expansive gardens, and quite a few portraits that held some local interest. Sure she'd got the job as much for her build as her knowledge. Ciera didn't know what part her natural copper hair played in securing her the job. 'A fine Irish Lass', she'd been called once the interview was completed. Her beauty and obvious ancestry secured her the place, even appearing prominently in the promotional material, and on the web page. It had an appeal to a certain group of tourist, tracing their roots.

A field a few miles from the mansion had been the site of a battle, that while not famous was considered pivotal.

- - - - -

Ciera rolled her shoulders in her dress. It was a feat of engineering, with it having to be tailored exactly for her unique, extreme body shape. Secret supports were built into the side panels of the dress, and particularly strong seams joining it to the sleeves, allowed her to wear a backless dress. It spread, and shared the weight more evenly making her day less painful.

She stopped moving her shoulders, when she spotted one of the men in this tour group seemed, fascinated, fixated, more by her bust than her speech of the lord assembling the troops in preparation for the battle.

She barely paused in her speech, but fixed him with her death stare.

https://i.pinimg.com/originals/61/37/e2/...

He looked sheepish, knowing he'd been caught, cheeks pinked, and he mouthed a silent apology to her. Despite just having caught his ogling stare, she was sure his gaze would latch onto her rump as she led them to the next gallery.
1231.title: Ciera Flanigan

choices: The Sea looks rough, and the clouds dark... But, not too much.
Ciera felt the familiar motion, as she stepped onto the deck.
Ciera waved to her brother in the wheelhouse.
Readying the boat, they cast off and headed out to the fishery.
12311.content:
Thankfully, it was her last tour group of the day. After hanging about to answer any last questions, she left them to their drinks and snacks. She changed until she was practically unrecognisable. Carefully stripping out her formal outfit, and gaudy jewellery. She slips into two sports bras. The first just inadequate to the task in hand. Even with two they were struggling to contain her generous proportions.

Losing the formal shoes, and their heel, she slipped on a practical pair of comfortable shoes with thick rubber soles, and chunky grips. It was the boilersuit that transformed her appearance. With her bust smooshed against her, the display was less obvious, but to anyone giving her a more than casual glance could still tell, she was very busty.

Especially, as she reached back to pull her luxuriant hair into a simple tail, with the aid of a scrunchy. But, it did force her to thrust her chest out, as she reached high, and far back to guide it into some semblance of orderly queue.

Heading out of the mansion, she took a moment to take in the breath-taking view. The Sun burst through a gap in the clouds a ray of light shooting down to spotlight the village below, and the old stone harbour. It was a steep descent, with the mansion situated to give it a commanding view of the surrounding countryside, and the natural protection of the little bay.

- - - - -

Heading down the twisty path, that clung near to the cliff, she was cautious of keeping her feet. The girls just made it impossible to see exactly where she was placing her feet. The view, and their planting had to be spyed before it vanished beneath the swell of her bust.

Thankfully, she made it down to the little coastal village, and made her way through the streets. Checking her phone, she confirmed she was still in time. The tide wouldn't turn for half an hour, so she could make it to the family fishing boat and prepare it as needed.
12311.title: Ciera continues the tour, ending at the tea shop.

choices: A guest asks her for some vital information on a certain object.
12313.content:
This place didn't cause the bloom of excitment she wished for. True, she did enjoy the sights, but where was that sudden feeling of liveness that she yearned for? With a sigh, she led the tour group into the next gallery.

Crowds murmed their confined appreciation of the artworks and pieces of yesteryear. She had brought them into the late 1500's display of their Irish lands. Ciera watched as the group broke away from one another to prod and talk about the various gewgaws. Some had the decencey to ask what was what, but most kept to themselves.

Women's bust juggled in their shirts, and a part of Ciera was proud to say she was the bustiest. It was a common feature of women around the world to have a little more heft in their bosom. Well of course Ciera wouldn't know of a world where the average woman didn't have a bust of at least a E-cup.

Back onto the topic, Ciera pondered on her intense feeling of withdrawl. She tried her best to configure her feelings, she enjoyed her work yet felt empty of her actions.

What was missing from her? Her thoughts briefly reverted back to normal when she saw the same man who was taking a peek at her before come back for seconds.
12313.title: Ciera: Bored out of her mind

125.content:
Alright, so we're going to be taking a bit of a road trip around Europe. You know, these choice chapters can be a bit boring, so let's spice them up. For each country in the chapter, I'll give a random historical fact about the country in question.


France: France originally had the name Gaul. In fact, the entire area France was in was called Gaul. It was given that name by the Romans during Caesar's conquest of the region in 51-58 BC.

Spain: Did you know that Quill Pens originated in Spain? It's believe they originated in Seville around 600 AD. Before that, people used reed pens. Quill pens got popular because they were easier to use on vellum.
125.title: Another European country

13.content:
OK, so we're heading Eastward for our story. Do you have a specific country in Asia you're looking to write in? And now, interesting facts:

Japan: Long ago, samurai did use to exist in Japan, even in the 1850's. And if you can believe it, samurai even visited New York City in 1860, as diplomates. One of them, Tateishi Onojiro, even had a song written about him called Tommy Polka (he was nicknamed Tommy).

China: There's a legend that says silk was discovered in China around 2700 BC by Hsi-Ling-Shi, the wife of the emperor, in the garden.

South Korea: If you're going to write someone's name in South Korea, best not to use a red pen. This is because in South Korea, writing a name in red ink is considered bad luck, as you're essentially saying that person is dead, or will die soon.

India: India has quite possibly the wettest place on the planet. That place is Meghalaya village, which gets 11,873 milliliters or rain a year, and has a monsoon season lasting 6 months.
13.title: Asia

info.brief_description: Let's see the day-to-day life of women with much larger chests then normal.
info.description:
One type of story that I'm honestly fascinated by is one where a woman is exceptionally busty, but is trying to go about their day-to-day life. For some reason, though, I can't seem to find any good stories online involving that. All of them are usually straight smut. So, I'm going to change that, and we're going to create stories about women who go about their daily lives, but with immense chests.

Now, here are some rules before we get started:


Rule 1: Women must be at least 20 years or older. No exceptions.

Rule 2: Despite the idea of the story, I don't want straight smut in this interactive. You can imply sex happens off-screen, but don't show it on-screen. Toplessness, sexy costumes, and fanservice are alright, just no outright sex.

Rule 3: This is a story about the mundane crossed with immensity, so keep the lives at least somewhat down to Earth. Think of it like a slice-of-life story... with massive boobs.

Rule 4: If you want a woman to grow during the story, keep it somewhat realistic and slow. Don't have them instantly shoot up several cup sizes, but instead maybe an inch or two.

Rule 5: Don't try to go too overboard with sizes. While I am fine with insane sizes, try not to have the boobs fill an entire room. Fill a mattress, sure. That being said, the minimum size for boobs in this story is 50 cm (about 1.5 feet).

Rule 6: Because of the theme, actually have the boobs impact their daily lives. Show how they've had to remodel homes, adjust how they do things. And show the boobs actually interfering with a number of daily functions (unable to fit in some place, constantly blocking or knocking things over, ect.).

Rule 7: I've seen many, MANY stories where the woman have no problem walking despite their size, so try to make it so the boobs are at least fairly heavy.

Rule 8: I want no violence or assault of ANY kind. If the woman is a sports person in a fighting sport, like boxing or wrestling, that's alright. But anything that is illegal in our world will be deleted on sight.

Rule 9: Make each add at least 1000 characters long and have good spelling and grammar.


This isn't a rule, but when creating a new character, the description should look like this:
Name
Age
Place of Birth
Height
Weight
Bust Size (in CM and Feet)
Short Bio


With that, I think I have all the rules. Let's get started.
